examples.name: Low-risk auto-allow style policy record
examples.description: A policy for tool execution actions. Low-risk actions do not require approval. The policy has no explicit reviewer roles and a short timeout as a safety net.
examples.explanation: Only high and critical risk tool executions require approval. Low and medium pass through automatically. No reviewer roles are pre-assigned since approval is rarely triggered.

examples.name: High-risk approval request with evidence
examples.description: An agent wants to run a data mutation on production. The risk is CRITICAL. Evidence is attached showing the SQL and row count so the reviewer can assess impact.

request.summary: Bulk delete inactive users from production database
request.proposed_action: DELETE FROM users WHERE last_login < '2023-01-01' AND status = 'inactive'

evidence.label: SQL to execute
evidence.content: DELETE FROM users WHERE last_login < '2023-01-01' AND status = 'inactive'

examples.name: Reviewer approval decision
examples.description: A senior engineer reviews the high-risk approval request, examines the evidence, and approves with a note about mitigation steps.

request.summary: Bulk delete inactive users from production database
request.proposed_action: DELETE FROM users WHERE last_login < '2023-01-01' AND status = 'inactive'

evidence.label: SQL to execute
evidence.content: DELETE FROM users WHERE last_login < '2023-01-01' AND status = 'inactive'

decision.rationale: Query is scoped correctly. WHERE clause limits to inactive users with no login since 2023. Estimated 15k rows is acceptable. Ensure a backup is taken before execution.

examples.name: Timeout escalation case
examples.description: An approval request timed out because no eligible reviewer responded. The system escalated it to a higher role per policy. The outcome is ESCALATED and not executable.

escalation.note: tech_lead did not respond within 600 seconds, escalated to engineering_manager

examples.name: Rejected outcome not executable
examples.description: A reviewer rejected the approval request. The outcome is REJECTED and explicitly not executable, preventing the agent from proceeding.

evidence.label: Invoice details
evidence.content: Invoice INV-2024-042: $5,000.00, issued 2024-03-15, customer ACME Corp

decision.rationale: Refund amount exceeds $2,000 single-transaction limit. Requires VP approval per policy FIN-202. Re-routing to VP of Finance.
